patch.value: Tracks GitHub issue #241: report notes/learnings/files/docs/tests/comments/empty-body utilization in pm stats for governance audits.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implemented `pm stats --field-utilization` (GH-241). Added `fieldUtilization?: boolean` to StatsCommandOptions and `field_utilization?: ContentFieldUtilizationReport` to StatsResult (JSDoc: present only with --field-utilization, spread conditionally into the return). Light->WithBody path switch: utilization needs the heavy collections (notes/learnings/files/docs/tests/comments/deps) AND body, both dropped by listAllFrontMatterLight, so when options.fieldUtilization is true a single `items` var loads via listAllFrontMatterWithBody and feeds EVERY section (by_type/by_status, metadata_coverage, breakdowns work fine on the heavier rows); otherwise the light path is unchanged. Registered --field-utilization on the stats command in register-operations.ts and passed `fieldUtilization: options.fieldUtilization === true` to runStats. Tests: extended tests/unit/commands/stats-command.spec.ts with a present/absent + with-body-reader case (appends a note to one of two items, asserts fields.notes 1/2/50%, body 2/2/100%, body_populated/empty_body aliases, learnings 0/2/0% dormant-feature signal). typecheck clean for my files (pre-existing unrelated list.ts errors from in-progress branch work). Full suite: 216 files / 4275 tests pass. Did not touch contracts/MCP/docs/completion (owned by another agent).

patch.value: Shipped pm stats --field-utilization: content-field utilization report (notes/learnings/files/docs/tests/comments/deps/body/linked_command present vs total + percent, body_populated/empty_body aliases). Stats switches to the with-body reader when requested. New pure primitive computeContentFieldUtilization in core/governance/content-fields.ts. MCP pm_stats forwards fieldUtilization.

Shipped pm stats --field-utilization: content-field utilization report (notes/learnings/files/docs/tests/comments/deps/body/linked_command present vs total + percent, body_populated/empty_body aliases). Stats switches to the with-body reader when requested. New pure primitive computeContentFieldUtilization in core/governance/content-fields.ts. MCP pm_stats forwards fieldUtilization.
